cleaned_html_body:
Dear Steven,

Your imports of HS 6110 (sweaters) and 6204 (women’s woven garments) suggest a focus on quality knitwear and fashion apparel—categories where Arooj Enterprises excels. We’ve supplied similar products to brands like Macy’s and Neiman Marcus, matching your retail channels.

With a 150,000-unit monthly capacity and certifications like OEKO-TEX and SEDEX, we align with your volume and compliance needs. Our vertical integration ensures consistent quality, from yarn to finished garments, at competitive Pakistan-based pricing.

Unlike suppliers like Sun Kee Woollen or Gene Apparels, we offer end-to-end control over production, reducing lead times and defects. Happy to send samples or pricing—just say the word.

Best regards,
Asad Irfan | Senior Marketing Manager | Arooj Enterprises | www.texbase.com
